sources.notes: Indie and alt comedy in Philadelphia

sources.name: Eventbrite Philadelphia Comedy
sources.notes: Broad coverage of comedy events across the city

sources.name: Ticketmaster Philadelphia Comedy
sources.notes: Covers larger venues and touring acts

sources.name: Kimmel Cultural Campus
sources.notes: Multi-venue performing arts campus; comedy is a small fraction of programming

sources.name: The Met Philadelphia
sources.notes: Large concert/event venue; check titles and descriptions for comedy acts

sources.name: Underground Arts
sources.notes: Indie music and events venue; occasionally hosts comedy shows

sources.name: Johnny Brenda's
sources.notes: Fishtown bar and music venue; occasional comedy nights

sources.name: The Fillmore Philadelphia
sources.notes: Live Nation-operated music venue; touring comedians appear regularly

sources.name: Live Nation Philadelphia
sources.notes: Live Nation comedy filter for Philadelphia area; covers all Live Nation venues including The Fillmore and others

sources.name: Bowery Presents Philadelphia
sources.notes: Bowery Presents Philly events; covers venues they book in the city including TLA, Union Transfer, and others
